title: Code Tour — Where Everything Lives
description: A plain-English, kid-friendly map of Phase 1's code: folder tree, what each file does, an import diagram, and where to start reading.

title: Phase 1: Environment, Infrastructure & Cost Guardrails
description: Repo skeleton, five-table SQLite state layer, Groq client, and rate-limit scaffolding — built via subagent-driven TDD, gated by per-task and whole-branch review.
